test_cases.input_summary: Breaking news — government announces £28bn emergency offshore wind fund with 50GW target by 2035, 40,000 new jobs; environmental groups criticise absence of onshore wind provision. Target: national broadsheet, print and web.

Human-interest feature — 12 volunteers with no professional experience transform derelict Victorian mill into working community arts centre over 6 years, funded entirely by crowdfunding and donated labour. Target: regional magazine, print.

Opinion column — local news consolidation under two major media groups is structurally destroying original local journalism through cost-cutting logic; columnist argues for public funding model. Target: national digital news outlet, opinion section.
